# Passcode.CustomRegex

**Device Management Profile**

The regex defining the passcode policy.

## Declaration

```swift
object Passcode.CustomRegex
```

## Objects

- **Passcode.CustomRegex.PasswordContentDescription**: Descriptions of the policy, localized to supported locales.
